Join a Weekly Private Founder Circle for Entrepreneurs focused on Multiplication, Transformation, and Success Strategies.

Your Facilitator Dr. Rev. Madelaine Gomes Ms.C.D.
Dr. Rev. Metaphysical Science (USA)
Executive Advisor  ·  Author  ·  International Speaker
Advisor · Harvard Publication Board

Dr. Rev. Madelaine Gomes is not a conventional business consultant. She is a former corporate Director in HR and Staff Solutions, an Advisor to the Harvard Publication Board, and a Doctor of Metaphysical Science — with 35 years of watching brilliant entrepreneurs build impressive businesses on shaky foundations.

She works at the intersection of business development, conscious leadership, mindset, neuroscience, and spiritual science — and is deeply passionate about mental wellness as the foundation of sustainable success. As a published author and international keynote speaker, she brings both the science and the soul to every room she enters.

The foundation is always the same problem: the strategy is sound, but the leader hasn't yet become the person the business needs them to be. She bridges the worlds of business, neuroscience, leadership, and Theocentric wisdom — integrating mindset alchemy, Hermetic principles, and human development with practical strategy.

The XII Business Club is the table she built for the leader who is ready to close that gap — and build a business that multiplies.

"Build with clarity, wisdom, and purpose."
